blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
